title: Ive been talking to Spike Spencer lately
display_title: Ive been talking to Spike Spencer lately
wikitext:
[]: I've been talking to Spike Spencer lately...             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Tue Sep 01, 2009 8:25 pm it's business-related, granted, and not exactly something I can talk about on here, but maybe I could squeeze a Q&A out of him if there's enough demand. You know, I really pity the guy. He turns in a good, if imperfect performance and promptly gets labeled as the go-to guy for emo bastards. And he's hated by a lot of the Eva fandom for problems with the dub that aren't even his fault.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Sep 01, 2009 8:37 pm Can you/anyone else really think of any original questions that haven't been asked of him/other Eva voice actors a billion times?

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Tue Sep 01, 2009 8:39 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Can you/anyone else really think of any original questions that haven't been asked of him/other Eva voice actors a billion times?

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Tue Sep 01, 2009 8:56 pm SeanTucker wrote: He's a pretty nice guy overall. I'm almost amazed, I was expecting him to be a bitter old man but he's almost the complete opposite.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Tue Sep 01, 2009 9:48 pm Ask him if he feels that the new dub will be better. We already know it will be, but I want to know if he is confident.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Sep 01, 2009 9:49 pm Well I somehow doubt he's going to be like "no dude it totally sucks lol", even in the unlikely event that he thought so. It wouldn't really work towards his interests, y'know :p

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Sep 01, 2009 11:27 pm I can't think of anything. It's late and I'm normally not the one to be like "OMIGAWD! IT'S SOMEONE FAMOUS (relatively speaking)!!! HOW DO YOU LIKE TH MOVIE? WHAT'D YOU HAVE FOR BREAKFAST?" ect. ect... If anything, what's next on the horizon for him. But that's not Eva related. What kind of DVD release will Rebuild 1.0, 1.1 get (box sets or whatever)? (I've been holding off watching them until they actually come out on DVD this November.) But that's the only thing I can think of at the moment, and I don't even think that's in his jurisdiction to answer/know.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Tue Sep 01, 2009 11:45 pm You’re talking to Spencer, through business? ...Um, would you mind asking him if he found dubbing Shinji to be any different from his other roles ( Rolo and Akito for instance)?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Sep 02, 2009 12:27 am Synapsid wrote: ...Um, would you mind asking him if he found dubbing Shinji to be any different from his other roles ( Rolo and Akito for instance)?

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Sep 02, 2009 2:13 am You could ask him what projects he’s got in the works or something more personal if he doesn’t mind, after all everyone loves to hear the personal side of things.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Wed Sep 02, 2009 3:52 am I heard Robin Williams auditioned as Gendo for rebuild 1. Does he know anything about this?

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Wed Sep 02, 2009 6:29 am FallenTabris wrote: I heard Robin Williams auditioned as Gendo for rebuild 1. Does he know anything about this?

[]: What is the aojo?             Quote Post by chazthesilencer » Wed Sep 02, 2009 12:43 pm Well, no questions for the man, but could you give him the thanks of someone he has never met or heard of: me? With (a little) help from his words at the MCM expo 2007, I now do what I like to do for a living. I animated a robot punching itself in the face today, and I'm getting paid to do it. Seriously :] Oh yeah- and ask him to call it an "Aojo" from now on.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Sep 02, 2009 12:47 pm See if you can get any info out of him on the ADV situation.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Wed Sep 02, 2009 5:06 pm Synapsid wrote: You’re talking to Spencer, through business? ...Um, would you mind asking him if he found dubbing Shinji to be any different from his other roles ( Rolo and Akito for instance)?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Sep 02, 2009 5:44 pm That's what you get for consulting the All-Retarded-EvaGeeks.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Sep 02, 2009 6:30 pm BrikHaus wrote: That's what you get for consulting the All-Retarded-EvaGeeks.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Wed Sep 02, 2009 7:19 pm Granted I can still talk to the guy and do a Q&A, he doesn't seem to dislike me. The business thing went belly-up, is all.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Wed Sep 02, 2009 7:28 pm Ask him if the dubbing has been done for the scene when Misato and Shinji are lost going through Nerv, added in 1.11

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Wed Sep 02, 2009 7:38 pm Sadly from what Ive seen, they removed Ritsuko's swimsuit. :(
summary: []: I've been talking to Spike Spencer lately...             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Tue Sep 01, 2009 8:25 pm it's business-related, granted, and not exactly something I can talk about on here, but maybe I could squeeze a Q&A out of him if there's enough demand. You know, I really pity the guy. He turns in a good, if imperfect performance and promptly gets labeled as the go-to guy for emo bastards. And he's hated by a lot
